name: Git Diff
description: Compare file changes between commits, branches, or the working tree. Supports unified diff format with configurable context lines.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Diff target — a commit SHA, branch name, tag, or range (e.g. 'main..feature', 'HEAD~3'). Omit for unstaged changes.

parameters.name: paths
parameters.description: Limit diff to specific file paths or glob patterns

parameters.name: staged
parameters.description: Show staged (cached) changes instead of unstaged

parameters.name: contextLines
parameters.description: Number of surrounding context lines in unified diff output

parameters.name: stat
parameters.description: Include diffstat summary (files changed, insertions, deletions)

outputDescription: Unified diff text. When stat is true, includes a summary line with files changed, insertions (+), and deletions (-).
author: openspace
